app.title: Kinegram Generator
app.subtitle: Load one or more GIFs, pick the frames and generate the kinegrams + the shared barrier grid.

restart.title: Start over?
restart.body: All loaded GIFs and their settings will be removed, and you'll go back to step 1.

step1.title: Load GIFs
step1.aboutBody: A kinegram (barrier-grid animation or scanimation) is an optical illusion: the frames of an animation are interlaced as vertical strips inside a single printed image. When a transparent grid with black lines slides over it, the slits reveal one frame at a time and the image comes to life. This tool generates both printable parts: the kinegrams and their barrier grid.
step1.dropTitle: Click or drag one or more GIFs here
step1.dropHint: You can add more at any time.
step1.loaded: {{n}} GIF(s) loaded. You can add more.

step2.title: Select frames
step2.statusBase: Maximum {{max}} frames per GIF (the GIF with the fewest frames). Click to select/deselect; the number shows the order.
step2.statusUnequal: ⚠ All GIFs must have the SAME number of selected frames to share the barrier grid (now: {{counts}}).
step2.statusMin: Select at least 2 frames in each GIF.

step3.title: Paper and preview
step3.infoPrint: Print everything at 100% (no scaling). The same grid works for all of them.
